pi_items.source: Docker Compose v2 (current) uses format {project}-{service}-{instance} with dashes. Project 'jitsi' from /home/ga/jitsi, service 'web' from docker-compose.yml (no explicit container_name set), yields jitsi-web-1. Verified via Docker Compose documentation: https://github.com/docker/compose issues #6035, #9618, and current Docker documentation confirming v2 uses dashes as separators.

Docker volume mount in docker-compose.yml (line 10): /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web:/config:Z. The /config directory in the container is mounted from the host's /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web. The config.js file location is standard in Jitsi Meet Docker deployments. Verified via docker-compose.yml and Jitsi documentation: https://github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet

Verified via Jitsi Meet official configuration documentation and config.js source code at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jitsi/jitsi-meet/master/config.js. The 'sharedvideo' button is a standard toolbar button option in the toolbarButtons array and controls the 'Share a YouTube video' feature. It can be removed from the array to disable the feature. Confirmed in Jitsi documentation: https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/dev-guide/dev-guide-configuration/

Confirmed in docker-compose.yml (lines 4, 47, 86, 113) that all Jitsi services use tag stable-9753. Verified to be a real release on GitHub: https://github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet/releases/tag/stable-9753
Verified in setup_jitsi.sh (lines 40-42) which creates /home/ga/jitsi and copies docker-compose.yml there. Also referenced in setup_task.sh (line 13) and export_result.sh throughout.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses official Jitsi Meet Docker images (jitsi/web, jitsi/prosody, jitsi/jicofo, jitsi/jvb all at tag stable-9753) deployed via docker-compose at /home/ga/jitsi. The web container mounts /config from the host's /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web directory. The 'sharedvideo' button is a real and standard toolbar feature in Jitsi Meet that controls YouTube video sharing functionality and is configured in config.js's toolbarButtons array. The container running the web frontend will be named 'jitsi-web-1' (following Docker Compose v2 naming convention with dashes). Removing 'sharedvideo' from the toolbarButtons array disables the feature. The task creates synthetic test data (a simulated meeting room for UI testing purposes) to verify the feature can be disabled.
